pkgmetadata.longdescription: Out-of-tree kernel modules for the MediaTek MT7927 (Filogic 380) WiFi 7 + Bluetooth 5.4 combo found on recent ASUS/Gigabyte/MSI motherboards. The WiFi side (PCIe, architecturally MT7925) and the Bluetooth side (USB MT6639) are not yet supported by the mainline mt76/btusb drivers. This package extracts the mt76 and bluetooth source from a vanilla kernel tarball, applies the upstream (jetm/mediatek-mt7927-dkms) patch series adding the MT7927 PCI/USB IDs, 320MHz EHT data path and firmware paths, builds the modules against the running kernel and installs them under updates/ so they override the in-tree copies. Firmware blobs for the MT6639 are extracted from the proprietary ASUS driver ZIP.
